title: VIVOTE Microfibre Cloth, Kitchen Towel, Black Waffle Tea Towels, Barista Cloth, Super Absorbent & Quick Drying, No Water Marks, 40x60 cm, Pack of 3, Black,200gsm
features: 【SUPER ABSORBENT & QUICK DRYING】Material selection of polyester brocade fibre made of good water absorption, drying, use can quickly remove moisture, to avoid breeding bacteria, good cleanliness, not easy to be oil stains, coffee stains attached to easy to clean, durable and not deformed, no water marks, can be reused, longer life.

【PERFECT SIZE & HANGING DESIGN】Size: 40*60cm, easy to carry and store, 3-piece set is more convenient for frequent use and replacement. Repeatable cleaning and use, reduce the waste of using disposable paper towels, environmental protection and economic.

【WAFFLE TEXTURE & DURABLE】Microfibre kitchen wipes are black waffle texture, the unique black colour is perfect for decorating your kitchen, the waffle texture is more quality compared to normal kitchen wipes more in line with your taste.

【SUITABLE FOR MANY OCCASIONS】 Microfibre tea towel can be used to wipe ceramics, tableware, clean glass and even furniture at home. The product is medium size, easy to carry and store, suitable for travelling, barbecue and other occasions.

【WASH & CARE TIPS】 Hand washable or machine washable at 60°C or below, black fabric has a slight discolouration, please wash separately from bright coloured fabrics, please do not use fabric softener or bleach, cannot iron, keep away from fire source.
description: Product Description VIVOTE Microfibre Tea Towels VIVOTE Microfibre Tea Towels for household, kitchen and many other uses. It can be used as kitchen towels, dish towels, dish cloths, dish rags, hand towels ,tea towels or cleaning cloths. Soft Microfiber Fabric Made from microfiber fabric with a full waffle texture, this tea towel is comfortably soft and can be used to clean the surface of your dishes. Delicate Locking Edges The locking edges of this tea towel are very neat and sturdy and will not come apart easily. Non-Stick This microfiber tea towel has the advantage of being lint-free and lint-free, which is great for wiping dishes and cleaning them without leaving lint and water stains. Cleaning Cabinets VIVOTE kitchen towels can wipe glasses and more, and the soft microfiber fabric is absorbent and quick-drying, making dishes look new. Our waffle tea towel comes with a hanging loop, you can hang it on the kitchen wall/ cabinet, it's very convenient to take it all up and down, it also saves space and keeps your kitchen tidy. The microfiber tea towel fabric is breathable, wipe the dishes can make it clean and bright as new, at the same time can be used as a placemat to prevent tableware mildew or damage.
